caption: A wide shot captures the interior of a large legislative assembly hall filled with numerous people seated in tiered rows of desks. The attendees, primarily men, wear a variety of clothing, including white kurtas, formal shirts, and some wearing colorful turbans in shades of blue, orange, and pink. Each desk is equipped with a small computer monitor. The hall features light-colored wooden paneling and green carpeting in the aisles. Across the sequence of frames, the scene remains largely static, with the assembly members seated and facing forward toward a central point of focus outside the frame. Minor movements are visible among the individuals, such as shifting in their seats or slight turns of the head, but there are no significant changes in the overall composition or action. No on-screen text or logos are visible in the footage.
